hero.title: Choose the right OfficeIMO package, then install it the fast way.
hero.description: Use NuGet for application dependencies, PowerShell Gallery for PSWriteOffice, and GitHub release archives when you need the exact packaged artifact from the latest stable release.

paths.title: NuGet packages
paths.description: Best for .NET applications, services, workers, and libraries that want package-manager installs and version pinning in source control.
paths.label: Browse on NuGet

paths.title: PowerShell Gallery
paths.description: Best for admins and automation teams using PSWriteOffice from scripts, scheduled jobs, or CI/CD orchestration.
paths.label: Open PSWriteOffice

paths.title: GitHub release archives
paths.description: Best when you need the exact archive produced for a stable release, without browsing the GitHub releases page manually.
paths.label: Open Releases

sections.title: Create, edit, and inspect documents
sections.description: Start with the native package for the document family your application owns.

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Word
packages.summary: Create and edit .docx files with paragraphs, tables, images, headers, footers, and fields.
packages.best_for: document generation, reporting, mail merge, and Word automation

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Excel
packages.summary: Generate and edit .xlsx workbooks with worksheets, tables, formatting, and formulas.
packages.best_for: exports, operational reporting, and workbook generation from app data

packages.title: OfficeIMO.PowerPoint
packages.summary: Build .pptx presentations with slides, charts, text, media, and layout control.
packages.best_for: deck generation, executive reports, and presentation automation

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Pdf
packages.summary: Create, inspect, edit, merge, split, stamp, sign, validate, and render PDF files.
packages.best_for: PDF authoring, page operations, validation, rendering, and document security

packages.title: OfficeIMO.OneNote
packages.summary: Read, create, edit, and write native OneNote sections, notebooks, and packages offline.
packages.best_for: ONE and ONEPKG processing without Graph, OneNote, or COM

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Email
packages.summary: Read and write messages, Outlook items, mailbox stores, calendars, contacts, and address books.
packages.best_for: EML, MSG, PST, OST, OLM, mailbox migration, and Outlook data inspection

packages.title: OfficeIMO.OpenDocument
packages.summary: Create and edit ODT, ODS, and ODP files without LibreOffice or Office.
packages.best_for: native OpenDocument creation and Office-format conversion adapters

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Html
packages.summary: Parse HTML and MHTML, apply resource policy, render images, and project web content into document models.
packages.best_for: web archives, safe resource handling, rendering, and shared conversion semantics

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Markdown
packages.summary: Typed Markdown builder, reader, AST, and renderer for documentation and content pipelines.
packages.best_for: docs generation, markdown transforms, and round-tripping structured content

packages.title: OfficeIMO.CSV
packages.summary: Fluent CSV document model for read/write workflows that want stronger structure than raw strings.
packages.best_for: flat-file exports, CSV pipelines, and schema-aware data exchange

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Visio
packages.summary: Generate and manipulate .vsdx diagrams without desktop Visio dependencies.
packages.best_for: diagram generation, topology exports, and Visio-based workflows

sections.title: Entry points for admins, scripts, and AI-ready extraction
sections.description: Use these when the right starting point is PowerShell automation or read-only document extraction.

packages.title: PSWriteOffice
packages.summary: PowerShell module that brings OfficeIMO document generation into scripts and admin automation.
packages.best_for: scheduled reporting, admin tooling, CI jobs, and script-first automation

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader
packages.summary: Unified read-only extraction layer for Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown, PDF, and more.
packages.best_for: search indexing, RAG ingestion, content extraction, and normalization pipelines

sections.title: Specialized companion packages
sections.description: Use these when you already know the source format and want to convert or render it into another surface.

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Word.Html
packages.summary: Convert Word documents into HTML for web output and browser delivery.
packages.best_for: publishing Word content to the web or embedding it into HTML-first experiences

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Word.Markdown
packages.summary: Bridge Word documents and Markdown using the OfficeIMO.Word and OfficeIMO.Markdown stack.
packages.best_for: docx-to-markdown pipelines, docs migration, and round-tripping editorial content

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Word.Pdf
packages.summary: Export Word documents to PDF using the OfficeIMO Word model as the authoring source.
packages.best_for: Word-first reporting flows that need PDF delivery without desktop Office

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Excel.Pdf
packages.summary: Export Excel workbooks and selected worksheets to PDF using the first-party OfficeIMO.Pdf engine.
packages.best_for: workbook-first reporting flows that need printable PDF delivery without desktop Excel

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Markdown.Html
packages.summary: Convert HTML into OfficeIMO.Markdown documents and markdown text.
packages.best_for: HTML ingestion, cleanup, and markdown-first publishing workflows

packages.title: OfficeIMO.MarkdownRenderer
packages.summary: WebView-friendly markdown rendering helpers built on the OfficeIMO.Markdown model.
packages.best_for: desktop/webview surfaces that need rendered markdown with incremental updates

packages.title: OfficeIMO.MarkdownRenderer.Wpf
packages.summary: WPF-specific markdown renderer wrapper for desktop applications.
packages.best_for: Windows desktop apps that want a WPF-friendly markdown presentation layer

packages.title: OfficeIMO.MarkdownRenderer.IntelligenceX
packages.summary: Plugin pack for transcript-oriented MarkdownRenderer presets and Intelligence X visual aliases.
packages.best_for: desktop and WebView surfaces that need a domain-specific markdown rendering plugin

sections.title: Format adapters for modular ingestion
sections.description: Add these when a reader service needs adjacent formats without forcing every deployment to carry every adapter.

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Csv
packages.summary: CSV and TSV adapter extensions for OfficeIMO.Reader.
packages.best_for: flat-file ingestion that should share Reader chunks, hashes, and metadata

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Json
packages.summary: JSON adapter extensions for OfficeIMO.Reader.
packages.best_for: API exports and structured payloads that need deterministic indexing slices

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Xml
packages.summary: XML adapter extensions for OfficeIMO.Reader.
packages.best_for: element-oriented documents that still need Reader metadata and chunking

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Yaml
packages.summary: YAML adapter extensions for OfficeIMO.Reader.
packages.best_for: configuration files, manifests, and multi-document YAML streams that need deterministic Reader output

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Html
packages.summary: HTML adapter for OfficeIMO.Reader using the OfficeIMO.Markdown.Html pipeline.
packages.best_for: web pages, exported fragments, and HTML-first source material

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Epub
packages.summary: EPUB adapter for modular OfficeIMO.Reader ingestion.
packages.best_for: books, packaged publications, and long-form EPUB content

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Reader.Zip
packages.summary: ZIP adapter for OfficeIMO.Reader modular ingestion.
packages.best_for: archive traversal that needs safe paths and Reader-compatible output

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Epub
packages.summary: EPUB extraction primitives for modular ingestion pipelines.
packages.best_for: low-level EPUB extraction and reader adapter internals

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Zip
packages.summary: Safe ZIP traversal primitives for modular OfficeIMO ingestion pipelines.
packages.best_for: archive-aware ingestion helpers and ZIP-safe traversal

sections.title: Bidirectional Office and Google Workspace libraries
sections.description: Translate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint content, share Drive/authentication infrastructure, and add explicit synchronization when an application needs it.

packages.title: OfficeIMO.GoogleWorkspace
packages.summary: Shared sessions, transport, scopes, diagnostics, and fidelity contracts.
packages.best_for: the dependency-light foundation used by every OfficeIMO Google package

packages.title: OfficeIMO.GoogleWorkspace.Drive
packages.summary: Typed Drive files, conversion, collaboration, media, shared drives, and change tokens.
packages.best_for: applications and translators that need one reusable Drive owner

packages.title: OfficeIMO.GoogleWorkspace.Auth.GoogleApis
packages.summary: Optional Google client credential, installed-app PKCE, and token-store adapters.
packages.best_for: applications already using Google.Apis.Auth

packages.title: OfficeIMO.GoogleWorkspace.Sync
packages.summary: Drive change feeds, minimal checkpoints, and explicit dry-run/approval/apply outcomes.
packages.best_for: applications implementing repeatable cross-format synchronization

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Word.GoogleDocs
packages.summary: Bidirectional Word and Google Docs translation with revision-safe replacement.
packages.best_for: Word-oriented create, import, replace, and diff workflows

packages.title: OfficeIMO.Excel.GoogleSheets
packages.summary: Bidirectional Excel and Google Sheets translation with advanced object support.
packages.best_for: workbook-oriented create, import, replace, and diff workflows

packages.title: OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.GoogleSlides
packages.summary: Bidirectional PowerPoint and Google Slides translation with native and visual fallbacks.
packages.best_for: presentation create, template, import, replace, and diff workflows
